summary: Caldrith is a multi-tenant GitHub App (FastAPI ingest + an ARQ/Redis worker, NOT a CLI or Marketplace Action) that enforces GitHub configuration-as-code modelled on github/safe-settings: install the App, create an admin repo with .github/settings.yml, and Caldrith reconciles GitHub settings to match. The HTTP ingest path is thin (verify raw-body HMAC -> dedup on X-GitHub-Delivery -> enqueue ARQ job -> 202); heavy reconcile runs in the worker, fanning out one job per repo (plus one reconcile_org job for Organization accounts). `config/` (schema + loader + diff) is the pure, I/O-free core. Reconcile uses a TIER REGISTRY: runner.REPO_TIERS lists per-repo tier modules (repository, security, topics, labels, milestones, collaborators, teams, autolinks, custom_properties, interaction_limits, actions, variables, secrets, environments, pages, rulesets, files, branches), each exposing a reconcile() adapter returning TierResult rows; org-scoped settings (organization block) run via run_org_reconcile; suborgs/repos overlays resolve per-repo via reconcile.overlay. Reactive drift webhooks self-heal a repo/org on out-of-band changes. github.com Organization AND User accounts.

settings.purpose: pydantic-settings AppConfig reading env: APP_ID, PRIVATE_KEY (PEM), WEBHOOK_SECRET, REDIS_URL, GITHUB_API_URL (default https://api.github.com), ADMIN_REPO (default 'admin'), CONFIG_PATH (default '.github'), SETTINGS_FILE_PATH (default 'settings.yml').

api.app.purpose: create_app() FastAPI factory; mounts the webhooks router and ratelimit; GET /healthz (no deps), GET /readyz (Redis reachable).

api.webhooks.purpose: POST /: read RAW body -> verify signature -> dedup on X-GitHub-Delivery -> enqueue ARQ job -> return 202. Routes push/repository/pull_request plus reactive drift events (label/milestone/member/branch_protection_rule/repository_ruleset/public) that self-heal the affected repo (or org). THIN — no reconcile here.

api.security.purpose: verify_signature(secret, body, sig256_header) -> bool using HMAC-SHA256 over the RAW body with hmac.compare_digest. Pure, I/O-free.

api.ratelimit.purpose: slowapi limiter (per-IP + per-installation), Redis-backed with an in-memory fallback.

auth.client.purpose: GitHubClientFactory.for_installation(installation_id, base_url) -> a githubkit GitHub client using AppInstallationAuthStrategy. Builds a NEW client per job; never shares tokens across installations; base_url configurable for GHES.

config.schema.purpose: PURE. All tier models. RepoScoped holds every repo-scoped tier (repository, branches, rulesets, files, labels, milestones, collaborators, teams, autolinks, custom_properties, interaction_limits, actions, variables, secrets, environments, pages); SafeSettingsConfig(RepoScoped) adds restrictedRepos + organization + suborgs + repos overlays. RepositorySettings = all repos.update fields (+ topics/security routed to dedicated tiers). BranchProtection now includes restrictions + required_signatures. OrganizationSettings = orgs.update fields + actions/interaction_limits/custom_property_definitions/rulesets. config_json_schema() for docs.

config.loader.purpose: load_admin_config(client, owner, admin_repo, config_path, settings_file, ref=None) -> SafeSettingsConfig: fetch file contents via the GitHub API, yaml.safe_load, validate into the pydantic model.

config.diff.purpose: PURE. compare_deep(actual, desired) -> Diff(additions, modifications, deletions, has_changes). Ports safe-settings compareDeep semantics; ignores keys containing 'url' and the set {id, node_id}. I/O-free, idempotency-tested.

reconcile.planner.purpose: List target repos for an installation (account-type aware: Organization vs User) and build a per-repo reconcile plan.

reconcile.repository.purpose: RepositoryApplier: given desired RepositorySettings + a repo, compute the diff vs live settings and apply via repos.update (or return a NopResult in dry-run / when there are no changes).

reconcile.base.purpose: Uniform tier protocol. TierResult(tier, scope, changed, applied, notes) and RepoTier(name, configured, reconcile) — the registry entry every repo-scoped tier exposes as a module-level TIER.

reconcile.overlay.purpose: PURE overlay resolution. resolve_for_repo(config, repo_name) merges base -> matching suborgs (by repo glob) -> matching repos overrides (last wins; repository field-merges, other tiers replace) into the effective per-repo SafeSettingsConfig. has_overlays(config).

reconcile.runner.purpose: run_reconcile(client, installation_id, owner, repos=None, dry_run=False, head_sha=None): load admin config, resolve overlays per repo, run every configured REPO_TIERS tier per target, aggregate TierResult. In dry_run post a GitHub Check Run grouping changes by tier. REPO_TIERS is the per-repo tier registry. Re-exports run_org_reconcile.

reconcile.org.purpose: run_org_reconcile(client, installation_id, owner, dry_run=False): reconcile the organization block once per account (gated on account_type==Organization). Sub-reconcilers: orgs.update settings (generic diff), org actions, org interaction limits, org custom-property definitions, org rulesets (reuses ruleset._to_body/_has_drift).

reconcile.tiers.purpose: One module per repo-scoped tier. Each exposes `async def reconcile(client, target, config, *, dry_run) -> list[TierResult]` and a module-level `TIER = RepoTier(...)`. Full-replace+prune: labels, collaborators (direct), teams (org-only), autolinks, variables (and secrets when prune:true). Create/update-only: milestones, environments, rulesets. Dedicated endpoints (not repos.update): topics, security, interactions, actions, pages, variables, secrets, custom_properties. secrets manages PRESENCE only (values from CALDRITH_SECRET_<NAME>, PyNaCl sealed-box, never rotated).

worker.worker.purpose: ARQ WorkerSettings + jobs reconcile_installation (fan out one reconcile_repo per managed repo when any repo tier/overlay is configured, plus one reconcile_org when an organization block is present), reconcile_repo, reconcile_org. Redis settings from REDIS_URL.

worker.queue.purpose: Enqueue helpers (reconcile_installation / reconcile_repo / reconcile_org) + dedup_delivery(redis, delivery_id) using Redis SETNX with a TTL to drop duplicate webhook deliveries.

audit.logging.purpose: structlog JSON config + a helper to bind installation_id / delivery_id / repo onto the logger. Never binds credentials.

note_for_agents: Load this file on demand to locate code; it is NOT auto-imported into CLAUDE.md. Design rule: config/ (schema + loader + diff + overlay logic in reconcile/overlay) stays pure — no githubkit, ARQ, FastAPI, or network imports — so schema/diff/overlay are unit-tested with synthetic dicts. Ingest contract: POST / verifies the HMAC over the RAW body BEFORE any parse, dedups on X-GitHub-Delivery, enqueues, and returns 202 — no reconcile in the request. Build a NEW githubkit client per installation (AppInstallationAuthStrategy); never share tokens; base_url is configurable for the GHES future. ADD A TIER = a module with reconcile()+TIER registered in runner.REPO_TIERS (don't grow runner branches); configured() is evaluated on the resolved (overlay-merged) per-repo config. Full-replace tiers PRUNE undeclared items (labels/collaborators/teams/autolinks/variables; secrets only when prune:true); milestones/environments/rulesets never prune. secrets manages PRESENCE only (write-only values). Org settings run via run_org_reconcile (reconcile_org job), gated on Organization accounts. PR events are dry-run (Check Run) only; drift events self-heal idempotently. Still deferred (clean seams): GHES multi-registration, CEL policy. Tests mirror modules 1:1 under tests/.
